description_long: This is a sleek, streamlined blue airplane with a single propeller mounted at the nose and a smooth, aerodynamic fuselage. The wings are sharply swept and positioned low on the body, giving it a fast, racing appearance. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy and is situated towards the front of the fuselage, likely accommodating a single pilot. The tail features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all with clean, angular lines. The landing gear is retractable, with the main wheels housed under the wings and a smaller nose wheel. The overall design suggests a high-performance, possibly racing or sport aircraft, with a glossy blue finish and minimal external markings.
description: A streamlined blue airplane with swept low wings, a single nose propeller, and an enclosed forward cockpit. It features retractable landing gear and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, single propeller at the nose, low swept wings, and the vertical tail fin.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed nose, propeller, wide wingspan, and the narrow cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the propeller and tail fin visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and the landing gear extended beneath the wings and nose.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
